guardrails: Keep generated product env files scoped to Studio, HayHashvapah, and CRM platform-postgres deployment contracts.
Keep platform tenant resolution strict by default and fail disabled tenant modules before rendering env files.
Keep redaction covering platform tokens and PostgreSQL passwords in both rendered env output and manifest-backed files.
Keep generated per-product env files and manifests written with 0600 permissions and portable relative manifest paths.
Do not expose platform tokens, database URLs, PostgreSQL passwords, authorization headers, or bearer tokens in eval output.
